title: 240 Sheets of Yellow MG Tissue Paper 20x30 Inches, Acid Free. Craft Colour Paper and Quantities of Sheets Listed Yellow
features: Size - approx 50cm x 75cm / 20" x 30" All quantities are approx.
Material - Full color tissue paper, 16GSM. Slight Shine on one side.
Usage - Great for use when storing items, decorative packaging also used arts and craft projects
Note: Color may vary slightly due to the color setting of each individual monitor.
description: Product Description Packitsafe For all your packaging needs Tissue paper Our colourful premium soft tissue paper is a great material to be used for storing items, decorating gifts and packages and for textured art and craft projects. Companies that often use tissue paper are jewellers, gift and flower businesses. Tissue paper can be used as a colourful alternative to bubble wrap. To use tissue paper as packaging, just wrap your item and place it inside the boxes or bag. tissue paper sizes available in our store. 15x20 inches = 381x381x508 MM 18x28 inches = 20x30 MM 20x30 inches = 508x762 MM Our tissue paper is available in is white, pastel pink, gold orange, black, peach pink, violet purple, cerise pink, cream, turquoise, lime green, baby blue, royal blue, lilac, dark blue, dark green, vivid green, corn yellow, tiger orange, silver, brown, burgundy and crimson red . tissue paper sizes available in our store. The level of thicknesses we currently offer is 16gsm. can order in bulk of 10,50,25,100 sheets and reams of 1(480 sheets),2(960 sheets) and 5(2400 sheets) can order in bulk of 10,50,25,100 sheets and reams of 1(480 sheets),2(960 sheets) and 5(2400 sheets) colours may slightly vary due to the colour setting on your computer. The 10, 25 and 50 Sheets will be folded 3 times due to the large size of each sheet. 100 plus Sheets will be folded no more than twice.
